The '''Dwarf Varactyl''' was a small [[Subspecies/Legends|subspecies]] of [[Varactyl/Legends|varactyl]] that made its way to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

One distinct difference between the Dwarf Varactyl and its larger relative were four functional wings, with which it was able to avoid predators such as the [[Worrt/Legends|Worrt]].
